title: split_project_secret should use split_once instead of manual find+slice
description: Current code uses path.find('/') followed by manual slice indexing and a separate contains('/') check. str::split_once('/') expresses the same intent in one call and is the idiomatic Rust approach: let (project, secret) = path.split_once('/')?; — then check is_empty() and contains('/') on the two parts. Fewer lines, no manual index arithmetic, clearer intent.
